Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John L. Viola, esq. (310-282-9407) of Thompson Coburn LLP for Plaintiff.
Liz Stonhaus, esq. (415-288-6399) of Littler Mendelson PC for Defendant.

Hearing is held; counsel addresses several case citations (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AFFIRM INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Taken Under Submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Continued To Mar-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Feb-14-2019 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John L. Viola, Esq., Thompson Coburn, LLP, Telephone 310-282-9407, appearing for Plaintiff
Elizabeth A Stonhaus, Esq., Littler Mendelson, /telephone 415-433-1940, appearing for Defendant Addirm Inc., et al;

Ruling - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AFFIRM INC's Hearing On Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Continued to March 12, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 Law & Motion and will limited to the single issue of which of the two contract doctrines apply. Further concurrent briefing are due by March 1, 2019.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
